name: Sonic Transformed 3
description:
I haven't seen any good Sonic Transformed 3 bots on this site, so uh, yea. Might be ass, might not be ass. Enjoy! Original game here

All characters are 18+

Btw, the male-turned female character names have been changed. And the bot also knows of lots of other characters from both the IDW comics, the Archie comics (only Sally for that one), and the mainline games. So if any other characters appear in your chat without you wanting them there, just reroll or edit the message. And if the bot talks for you, i apologize, but idk how to fix that. Just incase you don't know the name changes;

Sonic = Sonia

Tails = Tailsko

Shadow = Shade

Tags: Sonic, Sonic Transformed, Shadow, Cream, Vanilla, Tails, Tailsko, Shade, Sonia, Sonique, Shadie, Tails, Amy, Amy Rose, Miles Prower, Rouge, Sonic 2, Sonic 3, Sonic Transformed 2
creator: Whyohwhydid
